Medium Cut Foam Pad
Premium polishing pad for fine abrasive polishes

Foam Pad for use with medium-cut abrasive polishes. Removes slight scratches, holograms, and surface imperfections in combination with Menzerna Medium Cut polishes. The unique foam formulation delivers the perfect cut and generates shine.
Accessories
Processing

Rotary
Orbital
With Hand Polishing Applicator
